items.a: IDL Road, opposite IDL Lake, Hyderabad — 500072, between Kukatpally and Balanagar. Kukatpally metro is about 800 m away. See the Location page for the map.

items.q: What configurations and sizes are available?
items.a: Spacious 3 and 4 BHK lakefront homes, many corner-facing, all with 10.35-ft ceilings and privacy foyers. Exact carpet areas and pricing are shared on enquiry.
Yes — TS RERA P02200011012, verifiable on the Telangana RERA portal.
Construction is progressing on schedule; the committed possession timeline is shared on request and stated in your agreement.

items.q: Can I get a home loan? Which banks are approved?
items.a: Yes — the project is supported by leading banks and housing-finance companies. Our team will share the approved-financier list and help with the process.

items.q: How do I book a site visit?
items.a: Fill an enquiry form or tap “Book a site visit” anywhere on the site, and we’ll call you to arrange a convenient time. Visits are private and no-obligation.
